name: components/separator
description: A visual divider that separates content into distinct sections. Supports both horizontal and vertical orientations via data attributes, with automatic dimension rules (horizontal = full width, 1px height; vertical = full height, 1px width). Built on Kobalte Separator and fully accessible with the correct ARIA role. Styled with theme border colors and no visible border element.
useCases: Dividing navigation menu items or dropdown menu groups
Separating metadata rows such as date, author, and tags in article cards
Horizontal rules between form sections or checkout steps
Vertical dividers between buttons inside a toolbar or pagination group
